description: Configure a new inventory-tracked menu item in Floreant POS and verify the system's automated deduction by processing a sale. Create two inventory items, 'Wagyu Patty' and 'Brioche Bun', each with an initial stock of 100. Create a menu item named 'Wagyu Burger' priced at $25.00 and configure its recipe to use one 'Wagyu Patty' and one 'Brioche Bun'. Complete the task by processing a 'Dine In' order for one 'Wagyu Burger' and settling the transaction with cash.
